name: Cool 'n Easy Lime Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir boiling water into JELL-O in a large bowl until dissolved.
2. Mix cold water and ice to make 1 1/4 cups.
3. Gradually add the mixture to the gelatin, stirring until slightly thickened (consistency of unbeaten egg whites).
4. Remove any remaining ice.
5. Stir in the tub COOL WHIP with a wire whisk until smooth.
6. Refrigerate for 10 to 15 minutes or until the mixture is very thick and will mound.
7. Spoon into crust. There may be some leftover.
8. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until firm.
9. Garnish each slice with alternating lime slices and dollops of COOL WHIP just before serving.
